Contact Us

What we do

Design, maintenance, fixes, automation planning, WooCommerce, SEO, and analytics.

Each service is scoped for non-technical business owners who need confident recommendations and dependable execution.

Website Design and Development

New WordPress builds, redesigns, service pages, landing pages, and conversion-focused site structures.

Website Maintenance

Updates, backups, uptime review, small content edits, support requests, and ongoing improvements.

Website Problem Fixes

Broken layouts, plugin conflicts, forms that fail, slow pages, mobile issues, and urgent cleanup.

AI Chatbot Integration

Planning and implementation support for chatbot experiences as a service offering, without bundled API keys.

AI Website Automation

Workflow planning for forms, content operations, lead routing, and website-integrated automations.

WooCommerce Services

Store setup, product organization, checkout improvements, email flow coordination, and tracking.

SEO and Analytics

Search foundations, metadata planning, technical cleanup, analytics events, and conversion tracking.

© 2026 Nolan Digital Studio
